get.summary: ListRMGroups lists group heads with search + filter + pagination.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on code, name, description, colourant, ci_name.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active status.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary: CreateRMGroup creates a new RM group head.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Create a new RM group head.

get.summary: ExportRMGroups exports all groups + their items to a 2-sheet Excel.

parameters.name: activeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter by active/inactive (UNSPECIFIED = all).

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

post.summary:
ImportRMGroups imports groups and/or items from a 2-sheet Excel. Users can
include only the Groups sheet, only the Items sheet, or both.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
ImportRMGroupsRequest accepts a 2-sheet Excel. User may include only the
Groups sheet (header-only import), only the Items sheet (detail-only for
existing groups), or both.

get.summary:
DownloadGroupItemsTemplate returns a blank one-sheet Excel with just
the columns ImportGroupItems expects. Paired with ImportGroupItems.
DownloadRMGroupTemplate returns a blank 2-sheet Excel with header rows.

ListUngroupedItems reports items from the sync feed that have no active
group assignment.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on item_code, item_name, item_type_code, grade_code.

get.summary: ExportUngroupedItems exports ungrouped items matching the filter to Excel.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search on item_code, item_name, item_type_code, grade_code.

get.summary: GetRMGroup retrieves a group head + its details.

delete.summary: DeleteRMGroup soft-deletes a group head (cascade to its details).

put.summary: UpdateRMGroup applies a partial update to a group head.

get.summary:
GetRMGroupItemRates returns per-item per-stage rates for every active
detail of a group in a given period.

post.summary:
AddItems assigns items to a group. Items already in another active group
are returned in `skipped` instead of failing the batch.

ImportGroupItems bulk-assigns items to ONE existing group from a
one-sheet Excel. Uses the same validation as the interactive AddItems
flow (one item / one active group, sync-feed lookup, idempotent re-add).
RemoveItems removes details from a group (deactivate or soft-delete).

parameters.name: groupHeadId
parameters.description: Owning group head UUID (validated against each detail).

put.summary: V2: UpdateGroupItem updates one detail row's valuation fields + sort/active.

itemCodes.description: Item codes to add (legacy: grade_code is resolved server-side).

selections.description: Structured selections carrying grade_code. Preferred over item_codes.

RMGroupServiceAddItemsBody.description:
Add one or more items to a group. Items already in another active group are
returned in `skipped` rather than erroring the whole batch.

Prefer `selections` — it carries grade_code which is required to correctly
disambiguate multi-variant items. `item_codes` is retained for backwards
compatibility; when both are supplied, `selections` wins.

fileContent.description:
Excel file content (.xlsx / .xls). Expected "Items" sheet with columns
item_code (required), grade_code (optional), sort_order (optional).

RMGroupServiceImportGroupItemsBody.description: ImportGroupItemsRequest bulk-adds items to a specific existing group.

RMGroupServiceRemoveItemsBody.description:
Remove items from a group by detail IDs. The mode controls whether the rows
are deactivated (preserved for history) or soft-deleted.

clearValuationFreightRate.description: Clear flags for nullable valuation fields (force NULL).

RMGroupServiceUpdateGroupItemBody.description: V2: Partial update of one detail row's valuation fields + sort_order/is_active.

clearInitValValuation.description: When true, force init_val_valuation to NULL (overrides init_val_valuation field).

clearInitValMarketing.description: When true, force init_val_marketing to NULL.

clearInitValSimulation.description: When true, force init_val_simulation to NULL.

clearMarketingFreightRate.description: V2 clear flags for nullable marketing fields.

RMGroupServiceUpdateRMGroupBody.description:
Partial update of an RM group head. Absent fields leave state unchanged.
Clear_* booleans explicitly set nullable fields to NULL.

v1ActiveFilter.description:
ActiveFilter represents filter options for is_active field.

 - ACTIVE_FILTER_UNSPECIFIED: Show all records regardless of active status (default).
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_ACTIVE: Show only active records.
 - ACTIVE_FILTER_INACTIVE: Show only inactive records.

gradeCode.description:
Grade code (optional). Empty matches the variant with NULL / empty
grade_code in the sync feed. Use "" when the row has a single variant.

valuationFreightRate.description: V2 optional valuation inputs (per-detail). Backend stores NULL when omitted.

v1AddItemSelection.description:
AddItemSelection identifies one RM variant to assign to a group. The
(item_code, grade_code) pair is the natural key: an item_code with
multiple grade_code variants in the sync feed represents distinct
rows that can be grouped independently.

skipped.description: Items that were skipped because they already belong to another active group.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created (ISO 8601).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated (ISO 8601).

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

groupCode.description: Group code (uppercase; spaces + hyphens allowed; 1-30 chars).

costPercentage.description: Cost percentage multiplier (>= 0). Aliased as Marketing Duty %.

costPerKg.description: Per-kg overhead (>= 0). Aliased as Marketing Transport Rate.

v1CreateRMGroupRequest.description: Create a new RM group head.

v1DownloadGroupItemsTemplateResponse.description: DownloadGroupItemsTemplateResponse carries the blank template bytes.

v1ExportRMGroupsResponse.description: ExportRMGroupsResponse returns a multi-sheet Excel (Groups + Items).

v1ExportUngroupedItemsResponse.description: ExportUngroupedItemsResponse carries the Excel bytes + filename.

data.description: Per-item rates, one row per active detail.

rowNumber.description: Row number in the Excel file.

v1ImportError.description: ImportError represents a single import error.

itemsSkipped.description: Number of items skipped (already in this or another group, or invalid).

failedCount.description: Number of rows that failed to parse at the Excel layer.

skipped.description: Skip details propagated from AddItems (ownership collisions, etc).

duplicateAction.description:
How to handle existing groups by `group_code`: "skip" (default) or "update".
Detail rows always additive: items already active in ANOTHER group are
reported as skipped errors; items already in the target group are ignored.

v1ImportRMGroupsRequest.description:
ImportRMGroupsRequest accepts a 2-sheet Excel. User may include only the
Groups sheet (header-only import), only the Items sheet (detail-only for
existing groups), or both.

groupsSkipped.description: Number of group heads skipped (duplicate_action=skip + existed).

itemsAdded.description: Number of detail items successfully added.

itemsSkipped.description: Number of detail items skipped (already in target group).

failedCount.description: Number of failed rows (across both sheets).

data.description: Ungrouped items for the requested filters.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

marketValueRp.description: Per-item marketing value in rupiah (nil when unset).

isActive.description: Contributes to rate aggregation when true.

isDummy.description: Placeholder row (excluded from aggregation regardless of is_active).

valuationFreightRate.description: V2: Valuation freight rate (per detail; feeds CL/SL/FL formulas).

valuationDefaultValue.description: V2: Valuation default value (per detail; drives FL).

v1RMGroupDetail.description: RMGroupDetail is one item's membership in an RM group.

v1RMGroupFlag.description:
RMGroupFlag identifies which aggregated stage rate feeds a cost purpose
(valuation / marketing / simulation), or whether the group uses its
configured init override value. Mirrors the `cst_rm_group_head.flag_*`
domain constraint.

 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected on create/update requests via not_in: [0].
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_INIT: Use the init_val_* override on the head; skips cascade.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_CONS: Use the CONS stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_STORES: Use the STORES stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_DEPT: Use the DEPT stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_1: Use the first PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_2: Use the second PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_3: Use the third PO stage rate.

groupCode.description: Unique group code (uppercase; allows spaces + hyphens; 1-30 chars).

costPercentage.description: Cost percentage multiplier (raw, UI formats for display).

costPerKg.description: Per-kg overhead added to landed cost.

flagValuation.description: Stage flag used for valuation cost.

flagMarketing.description: Stage flag used for marketing cost.

flagSimulation.description: Stage flag used for simulation cost.

initValValuation.description: Init-value override for valuation (set when flag_valuation = INIT).

initValMarketing.description: Init-value override for marketing (set when flag_marketing = INIT).

initValSimulation.description: Init-value override for simulation (set when flag_simulation = INIT).

marketingFreightRate.description: V2: Marketing freight rate (added to base rate before duty/anti).

marketingAntiDumpingPct.description: V2: Marketing anti-dumping percentage (whole percent, e.g. 5 = 5%).

marketingDefaultValue.description: V2: Marketing default value (drives FP projection when set).

valuationFlag.description:
V2: Valuation flag (CR/SR/PR/CL/SL/FL) — replaces flag_valuation semantics
for the new engine. When UNSPECIFIED uses AUTO fallback CL→SL→FL.

marketingFlag.description:
V2: Marketing flag (SP/PP/FP) — replaces flag_marketing semantics.
When UNSPECIFIED uses AUTO fallback SP→PP→FP.

v1RMGroupHead.description: RMGroupHead is the aggregate root representing an RM group's cost configuration.

v1RMGroupHeadWithDetails.description: RMGroupHeadWithDetails bundles a head and its details for the Get response.

isDummy.description: Whether the detail is a dummy row.

period.description: Period the rates apply to (YYYYMM), empty when no sync row was found.

v1RMGroupItemRates.description:
RMGroupItemRates is one row per item currently in a group with its per-stage
Oracle sync rates for a given period. Items with no sync row for the period
still appear (all rates 0).

v1RMMarketingFlag.description:
RMMarketingFlag selects which computed marketing projection becomes
`cost_mark`. UNSPECIFIED behaves as AUTO (SP → PP → FP fallback).

 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Treated as AUTO (SP→PP→FP fallback).
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_SP: Projection Stock Landed Cost.
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_PP: Projection PO Landed Cost.
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_FP: Projection Fix Value Landed Cost.

v1RMValuationFlag.description:
RMValuationFlag selects which computed rate becomes `cost_val` in the
RM Cost row. UNSPECIFIED behaves as AUTO (CL → SL → FL fallback, where
FL incorporates the per-detail valuation_default_value).

 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Treated as AUTO (CL→SL→FL fallback).
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_CR: Use Consumption Rate (CR) — group-total cons_val / cons_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_SR: Use Stock Rate (SR) — group-total stock_val / stock_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_PR: Use PO Rate (PR) — group-total po_val / po_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_CL: Use Consumption Landed Cost (CL) — group-total CL aggregate.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_SL: Use Stock Landed Cost (SL) — group-total SL aggregate.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_FL: Use Fix Landed Cost (FL) — MAX of per-detail FL.

v1RemoveItemsMode.description:
RemoveItemsMode controls how RemoveItems disposes of detail rows.

 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected via not_in: [0].
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_DEACTIVATE: Mark the details inactive but keep the rows for audit history.
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_SOFT_DELETE: Soft-delete the details (sets deleted_at/deleted_by).

v1SkippedItem.description:
SkippedItem captures items rejected by AddItems because they already belong
to another active group.

v1UngroupedItem.description:
UngroupedItem is a raw material present in the Oracle sync feed that has no
active RM group assignment.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.
